query: UPDATE categories SET slug = 'gift-boxes' WHERE id = 1; INSERT INTO categories (name, slug, description, image, sortOrder) VALUES ('Cosmetic Packaging', 'cosmetic-packaging', 'Elegant packaging solutions for beauty and cosmetic products', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663282521287/ovrzWdQHIaAnVqiE.jpg', 2), ('Food Packaging', 'food-packaging', 'Safe and attractive food-grade packaging solutions', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663282521287/QZCksrJleWpBZeKq.jpg', 3), ('Jewelry Boxes', 'jewelry-boxes', 'Luxurious boxes crafted for precious jewelry and accessories', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663282521287/RTXxcSlmspRwpAto.png', 4), ('Luxury Packaging', 'luxury-packaging', 'High-end packaging for premium brands and luxury products', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663282521287/IkkdETivMIDuHbLU.png', 5);
